args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.AccountId = o.AccountId
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.AccountId = o.AccountId
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25' AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

result.preview:
"SQLite query execution error (DatabaseError): Execution failed on sql 'SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sales_pipeline.Opportunity opp
    JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.Id = opp.ContractID__c
    WHERE opp.AccountId = o.AccountId
      AND c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25'
      AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
)
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;': no such table: sales_pipeline.Opportunity"

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sales_pipeline.Opportunity opp
    JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.Id = opp.ContractID__c
    WHERE opp.AccountId = o.AccountId
      AND c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25'
      AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
)
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sales_pipeline.Opportunity opp
    JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.Id = opp.ContractID__c
    WHERE opp.AccountId = o.AccountId
      AND c.CompanySignedDate >= '2022-06-25'
      AND c.CompanySignedDate < '2022-11-26'
)
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC
LIMIT 1;
